preset.name: spectraldock-linux-gcc-gpu
preset.comment: SpectralDock PhysX 5.8 GPU SDK (Linux GCC, CUDA 12.8)

cmakeSwitch.name: PX_GENERATE_STATIC_LIBRARIES
cmakeSwitch.comment: Build the CPU SDK as static libraries

cmakeSwitch.name: PX_GENERATE_GPU_PROJECTS_ONLY
cmakeSwitch.comment: Build both CPU and GPU SDK components

cmakeSwitch.name: PX_FLOAT_POINT_PRECISE_MATH
cmakeSwitch.comment: Use the upstream default math mode

cmakeSwitch.name: PX_GENERATE_GPU_STATIC_LIBRARIES
cmakeSwitch.comment: Keep libPhysXGpu as the runtime-loaded shared library

cmakeSwitch.name: PX_GENERATE_GPU_REDUCED_ARCHITECTURES
cmakeSwitch.comment: Retain the full upstream GPU architecture set

cmakeParam.name: CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX
cmakeParam.comment: Install path relative to the PhysX SDK root

cmakeParam.name: CUDAToolkit_ROOT_DIR
cmakeParam.comment: CUDA toolkit embedded in the build image
